title: Early Bird 2026 – Save 10%
description: Book any 2026 tour at least 90 days in advance and save 10% on the base tour price.
conditions: Minimum 90-day advance booking. Non-refundable deposit of 25% required at booking.

title: Honeymoon Special – Complimentary Upgrade
description: Honeymooners get a free room upgrade, flower decoration, and a special candlelight dinner on arrival night.
freeAdd: Room upgrade + flower decoration + candlelight dinner (value ₹3500)
conditions: Must mention honeymoon at time of booking. Copy of marriage certificate required.

title: Family of 4+ – Child Discount
description: Travelling with children (5–11 years)? Get 30% off for each child on twin-sharing basis.
conditions: Minimum 2 adults required. Children under 5 travel free (sharing bed with parents). Standard child rate applies without this promo.

title: Royal Loyalist – Returning Customer Discount
description: Travelled with Royal Journeys before? Enjoy an exclusive 7% loyalty discount on your next booking.
conditions: Must have travelled with Royal Journeys within the last 2 years. Booking must be made directly with us.
